title: Incorrect results when OR is used in the ON clause of a LEFT JOIN
poc: CREATE TABLE t2(y INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,a,b);
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a=2 OR b=3 WHERE y IS NULL;
key_bug_features: OR operator in ON clause of LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(y INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, a TEXT, b REAL);
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a='two' OR b IS NULL WHERE y IS NULL;
